---
format:
  pdf:
    # latex-auto-install: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \addtokomafont{disposition}{\rmfamily}
        \definecolor{darkgreen}{RGB}{0, 128, 0}
        \lhead{ \textbf{\Large Name: }  }
        \rhead{ STATXXX with Dr. McShane \\ \textbf{QQYY Exam} }
        \chead{     }
params:
  student: " "
  section: " "
---

`r sprintf(ifelse(params[["section"]] != " ", paste0("\\lhead{ \\Large \\textbf{Name: \\textcolor{blue}{ ", params[["student"]], " }", "\\textcolor{darkgreen}{ ", "[ID: ", params[["section"]], "]}}}"), " "))`

\pagestyle{fancy}

```{r render_chunk, eval = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
roster = readr::read_csv("roster.csv")
# roster = roster |>
#   filter(Exam != "SDS")

for (i in seq(len = nrow(roster))) {
  file_name = paste0(
      "STAT-XXX-QQYY-Exam-", 
      roster[["ID"]][i], "-",
      roster[["Last"]][i], "-",
      roster[["First"]][i], ".pdf"
    )
  quarto::quarto_render(
    input = "STAT-XXX-QQYY-Exam.qmd",
    output_file = file_name,
    execute_params = list(
      student = paste(roster[["First"]][i], roster[["Last"]][i]), 
      section = roster[["ID"]][i]
    )
  )
  fs::file_move(path = file_name, new_path = paste0("printing/", file_name))
}
```

This is the exam text. 

This is the exam text. 

This is the exam text. 

This is the exam text.
